prompt:
Create a bright, high-resolution anime-and-real-photo composite scene at a lakeside tourist spot. Three cute anime cat-eared girls stand in the foreground in front of a large dark bronze abstract statue shaped like a tilted mask or shell with hollow eye-like openings. Behind them is a blue lake, wooden railing, green grass, leafy tree on the left, distant mountains including a snow-capped peak, and a sunny blue sky with scattered white clouds. The style should blend detailed anime characters with a realistic outdoor travel-photo background, cheerful meme-like atmosphere, crisp daylight, soft shadows, and vibrant colors.

Subject details: Show exactly 3 cat-eared girls. Left girl: brown-gray short bob hair with cat ears, smiling open mouth, wearing an oversized light beige/white hoodie jacket over black shorts, black socks, and holding a white spiral notebook toward the viewer with the text ECOLE written in simple spaced uppercase letters. Center girl: smaller blonde cat-eared girl facing forward but with her face deliberately obscured by a flat beige square censor block, wearing an oversized red plaid hooded jacket, black shorts, and black lace-up boots, hands raised near her face as if shy or hiding. Right girl: white-blonde bob hair with cat ears, smiling and pointing one finger near her mouth, wearing a cream oversized jacket with dark hood, black shorts, black socks, standing in a playful leaning pose. Add large translucent soap bubbles around the characters: exactly 8 visible bubbles total, including 2 oversized bubbles near the lower left and lower right edges, 1 large bubble near the center girl’s legs, and 5 smaller floating bubbles in the sky and midground. Keep the statue dominant behind the trio and make the composition feel like fans gathering at a pilgrimage landmark. Use sunny lakeside sightseeing, dark weathered bronze, and modern cute anime catgirl illustration.
